title: Add Skia core CVE tracking to security audit skill
body:
## Summary

Extend the security-audit skill to treat Skia core as a first-class dependency. Previously the skill only audited third-party libraries; Skia CVEs were invisible to Component Governance (no standalone CPE — filed under `google:chrome`).

## Changes

- **SKILL.md**: Added NVD query workflow using `chrome_milestone` comparison for automated Skia CVE detection
- **report-template.md**: Added Skia-specific report formats (Chrome-versioned CVEs, non-Chrome CVEs, assessment guidance)
- **cgmanifest.json**: Added `chrome_milestone` and `upstream_merge_commit` tracking fields
- **dependencies.md**: Documented Skia CVE tracking methodology, query patterns, and false positive guidance

## PR Checklist

- [x] Has tests (N/A — skill/docs only)
- [x] Rebased on top of main at time of PR
- [x] Changes adhere to coding standard
- [x] Updated documentation
